title: Excalibur | yyz's backpack
description: A compatibility patch for Excalibur and yyz's backpack
body:
This is an unofficial compatibility patch that changes [yyz's backpack](https://modrinth.com/mod/yyzs-backpack) to have a GUI in the style of [Excalibur](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/excalibur-epic-knights-support).
## Features
- GUI change to match Excalibur
## Credits
This compatibility patch is not an official creation by [Maffhew](https://modrinth.com/user/Maffhew/resourcepacks), creator of [Excalibur](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/excalibur-epic-knights-support). This pack includes assets from the original resource pack with permission given.
